data.body: Implemented. Single chokepoint: added COMPLETION_REMEDIATION_GUIDANCE (generic; names the ticket-comments evidence channel; no force-close wording) and set result['remediation'] on every FAIL in reconcile_verdict (src/rebar/llm/completion.py) — so both the agentic FAIL and the deterministic child-closure FAIL (deterministic_child_failure) carry it. Surfaced it in the blocked-close error (transition_close.py) and the verify-completion text render (_llm_commands.py); documented the optional field in completion_verdict.schema.json (additionalProperties:true, non-breaking). Added 4 tests (FAIL carries guidance + names comment/evidence + no 'force' + generic; PASS has none; deterministic child FAIL carries it). Local: make lint + typecheck PASS; focused completion/close suites 60 passed; full make test running.
